message:
feat(tui): add anomaly-first sorting and narrow-width compact fallback (br-1xt0m.1.11.3)

Diagnostic findings are now sorted by severity (Critical > High >
Medium > Low) so the most actionable issues appear first, even when
only 1-2 cards fit. On very narrow terminals (< 30 cols), anomaly
cards gracefully degrade to compact styled text lines with severity
badges instead of rendering broken card widgets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
